summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Knowledge Wars WebSocket synchronization and 2-player match flow. All critical features are working correctly including WebSocket sync, challenge notifications, and match gameplay.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: All 14 API tests passed (auth, credits, matches, lobby, leaderboard, admin, health)
✅ Backend: WebSocket sync test passed all 9 steps
✅ Backend: Challenge notification delivered instantly via WebSocket
✅ Backend: game_start signal broadcast when 2/2 players connect
✅ Backend: ConnectionManager uses separate pools (notify_connections vs match_connections)
✅ Backend: Credits deducted on match accept (not on create)
✅ Backend: Match status changes to 'active' on accept
✅ Frontend: Home page displays user info (name, rank, credits)
✅ Frontend: Lobby page shows online players
✅ Frontend: Challenge button (Retar) works and sends challenge
✅ Frontend: Toast notification shows challenge sent confirmation
✅ Frontend: ChallengeNotification component has dark background (bg-gray-900/98) with white text
✅ Frontend: MatchPage listens for game_start event to start countdown
✅ Frontend: countdownStartedRef guard prevents double countdown triggers
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket synchronization is fully working. The ConnectionManager class uses separate pools: notify_connections for /ws/notify and match_connections for /ws/match. The game_start event is broadcast when both players connect to the match WebSocket. All backend tests pass. Frontend UI is functional with good contrast on challenge notifications.

synchronization.description: game_start broadcast when 2/2 players connect to match WS
